allow: Bash(awk '{sum+=$1; count++} END {printf "avg=%.1f total=%d\\n", sum/count, count}')
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name'], x.get\('type',''\)\) for x in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; body=sys.stdin.read\(\); start=body.find\('['\); d=json.loads\(body[start:]\) if start>=0 else []; [print\(x['name'],x.get\('type'\)\) for x in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name'],x.get\('type'\)\) for x in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['name'],x.get\('download_url',''\)\) for x in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.values\(\)\)[:3]; [print\(json.dumps\(x, indent=2\)[:300]\) for x in items[:2]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.values\(\)\); print\('type:', type\(d\).__name__, 'len:', len\(items\)\); item=items[0]; print\('keys:', list\(item.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else list\(d.values\(\)\); print\('len:', len\(items\)\); [print\(x.get\('query',''\)[:100]\) for x in items[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('query',''\)\) for x in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); [print\(x['full_name'],x['html_url']\) for x in items[:5]]")
